title: Kindness Comes Back Around
lesson: A small act of kindness returns to you when you least expect it.
prompts: On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks along the pavement, facing the camera with their face fully visible. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stops mid-step on the far left in the mid-ground, one hand raised in surprise, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and a concerned expression. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} has dropped a torn paper grocery bag and bends to reach after the oranges rolling across the ground. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, gathering oranges back into the torn bag. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} stands to the right with both hands clasped, watching gratefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks on the far left carrying two grocery bags, facing the camera with a kind smile and the face fully visible. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} walks beside them on the right, gesturing toward a small house with a blue door. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a roadside bus stop with wet reflective pavement, rain falling, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone with no umbrella, wrapping both arms tightly around themselves and hunching against the cold, facing the camera so the face remains clearly visible. Overcast grey light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a roadside bus stop with wet reflective pavement, rain falling, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, one hand pressed to their chest as they glance up at the umbrella, facing the camera with a surprised, grateful expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_25_RACE_ASIAN} holds a large umbrella over both of them and smiles warmly. Warm light breaking through the clouds, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a tree-lined suburban pavement in morning sun, the child walks along happily — an ordinary cheerful morning, the child alone.

On the suburban pavement, the child (far left) stops in surprise with one hand raised as an elderly woman on the right drops a torn grocery bag and oranges roll across the ground — the child has just noticed her trouble.
On the pavement, the child (far left) kneels gathering the spilled oranges back into the torn bag while the elderly woman stands at right, hands clasped, watching gratefully.
On the pavement, the child (far left) walks carrying two grocery bags with a kind smile while the elderly woman walks beside them at right, gesturing toward her house with a blue door.
At a rainy roadside bus stop under grey overcast light, the child stands alone with no umbrella, arms wrapped around themselves, cold and wet.
At the bus stop, the child (far left) looks up gratefully with a hand to their chest as a young man on the right holds a large umbrella over them both — kindness returning as the light warms.
texts: One sunny morning, you set off down the street. The birds were singing, and you felt happy.
Up ahead, an old lady's bag tore open and oranges rolled everywhere. "Oh no!" you said.
You knelt down and helped pick up every single orange. "Thank you, dear," the old lady smiled.
You carried her heavy bags all the way home. "You are so kind," she said warmly.
A few days later, rain poured down at the bus stop. You had no umbrella and got cold and wet.
Then a kind young man held his umbrella over you. "Stay dry!" he smiled. Your kindness had come back to you.
